name: Cheese Triangles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded jack cheese, cottage cheese, eggs, chopped parsley, and salt in a large bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
2. Cut each sheet of phyllo dough in half horizontally. Work with one sheet at a time, keeping the rest covered with a damp towel to prevent drying.
3. Brush each half of the phyllo sheet with melted butter, folding it twice vertically to form a narrow strip.
4. Place about 1 tablespoon of the cheese mixture at one end of each strip. Fold one corner across the filling to form a triangle shape.
5. Brush the triangle with more melted butter. Continue folding in triangles, flag-style, and brushing with additional butter.
6. Place the finished triangles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until the pastry is golden brown, about 15 to 20 minutes.
